sources.title: The Art Of Travel 2008 Dvdrip
sources.description: Having called off his wedding, a high school graduate journeys alone to Central America, finding adventure with a ragtag group of foreigners who attempt to cross the Darien Gap in record time.

metadata.Plot: High school grad. Conner Layne is about to marry his first love, but when wedding plans fail, he goes solo on his honeymoon to Central America, finding adventure with a ragtag group of foreigners who attempt to cross the Darien Gap in record time.
metadata.Actors: Christopher Masterson, Brooke Burns, Johnny Messner
